description_long: This is a lifelike model of a duck mounted on a rectangular wooden base. The duck features a dark brown head and neck, transitioning to a lighter brown and white underbelly, with a subtle gradient along its flanks. Its body is robust and slightly hunched, with webbed black feet firmly attached to the base, and a short, pointed beak. The wings are folded neatly against its sides, and the tail is short and rounded. The wooden base includes a small, aged label, suggesting it may be a preserved specimen or display piece. The overall appearance is realistic, with detailed feather textures and naturalistic coloration.
description: A realistic duck model with dark brown and white plumage, mounted on a wooden base with a label. The duck is standing upright with folded wings and webbed feet.
description_view_0: The left side of the duck is visible, showing the transition from dark brown to white on its body and the webbed feet on the wooden base.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the rounded tail, the back of the head and neck, and the label on the wooden base.
description_view_2: The right side of the duck is visible, with the beak slightly turned and the label on the base more prominent.
description_view_3: The front and underside of the duck are visible, showing the chest, beak, and both webbed feet on the wooden base.
